symptoms: - c.Skip("unstable, skip it and fix it before 20210702") | row := dbt.MustQuery("select * from " + table + " order by i") (server/server_test.go)
failure_signature: - c.Skip("unstable, skip it and fix it before 20210702") | row := dbt.MustQuery("select * from " + table + " order by i") (server/server_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is primarily a test-infra migration (moving tests to testify's `require`/`assert`) and retains the existing `t.Skip("unstable...")` skip. There is no concrete flaky-test failure signature or targeted stabilization change to classify beyond the framework migration itself.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
